creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
nivit       2011-04-27 08:56:07 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/cutycapt         Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  CutyCapt is a small cross-platform command-line utility to capture
  WebKit's rendering of a web page into a variety of vector and bitmap
  formats, including SVG, PDF, PS, PNG, JPEG, TIFF, GIF, and BMP.
  
  WWW:    http://cutycapt.sourceforge.net
  
  PR:             ports/155767
  Submitted by:   Axel Gonzalez <loox at e-shell.net>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2868    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +32 -0     ports/www/cutycapt/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/www/cutycapt/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/www/cutycapt/pkg-descr (new)
